novelty: measured-Tc-zero (group-14 tetrel H3X — first tetrel landed); §9.15 PASS in band 50-110K
purpose: Group-14 (tetrel) Si-analog. Tests whether H3X stoichiometry extends to tetrels (lighter than P/S in row 3). §9.15 prediction band 50-110K based on tetrel valence-electron count + bond character.
system: H3Si cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (1 Si + 3 H = 4 atoms), celldm=5.65641 bohr (a≈2.993 Å), PBE PAW

method.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 6x6x6 q (16 irreducible, weights [4,12,12,12,12,12,8,8,12,12,12,8,12,8,12,4]=160), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma 0.005-0.050 Ry (10 broadenings)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 and 0.13

ALIGNN_per_cand.pathology_note: ALIGNN AD-from-a2F gives Tc≈0.1K vs DFT 77-80K — 750× underprediction. Tetrel out-of-distribution; lambda underestimated (0.29 vs DFT 1.7-1.8).

section_9_15_verdict.broadening_monotonicity: λ_BZ converged (1.72 → 1.82 across 0.015→0.030, ~6% spread). Tc tight 77-80K — robust.
section_9_15_verdict.interpretation: §9.15 prediction band correctly bracketed tetrel H3X behavior. Validates the breakthrough-hypothesis lens that extended H3X beyond chalcogenide/halide groups.

honest_observations: Only PASS verdict among the 5 LANDED candidates — §9.15 band 50-110K bracketed 77-80K DFT result. Well-converged (~6% λ spread).
First group-14 (tetrel) H3X landed — extends H3X stoichiometry beyond group-16/17.
λ_BZ ~1.8 mid-range (H3F 0.8 < Si 1.8 < H3O 2.5) with moderate ω_log ~580K (H3Po 270K < Si 580K < H3O 1100K).
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1 + Pattern 2 preserved. PASS verdict is a numerical-tier-2 prediction-vs-band agreement, not absorbed=true.
citations: RTSC.md §9.15 (H3X group sweep — Si PASS in band)
